title: Dark’s Tiny Tools
description: Adds tiny tool textures to give players a cleaner view and smoother PvP experience
body:
![all items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/575f9ded38cac13b49ba4a1fac4db51359fe8709.jpeg)                       

**Dark’s Tiny Tools** is a simple PvP-focused texture pack that makes all tools, swords, and weapons smaller without changing Minecraft’s original style. This pack is made to make all tools smaller so they don’t take much space while PvPing or playing, giving you a cleaner screen and better visibility. Perfect for players who want smooth gameplay and faster reactions in battle.

 
![sword in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e9bf69bc39a3303977c066799d3d718d5cd556c.jpeg)


**Support & Community:**
